mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_document (id, document_id, document_name, embed_id, type, isdelete, create_time) values (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{documentName}, #{embedId}, #{type, typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.knowledge.handler.KnowledgeDocumentTypeHandler}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select type from col_kb where kb_id=#{knowledgeCatalogId}

select * from knowledge_document
type in
#{t}
and isdelete=1 and document_id not in ( select document_id from collection_document where kb_id=#{knowledgeCatalogId} and isdelete=1 )
select * from col_kb where kb_id in (select kb_id from collection_document where document_id=#{knowledgeDocumentId} and isdelete=1)
